title: Flavorful Smoky Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: This hearty Norwegian lamb stew is a perfect blend of umami flavors, tender lamb, and cozy warmth, featuring the unique taste of shiso leaf and smoky undertones, all without added sugar.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the lamb broth, bringing the mixture to a boil, then reducing the heat to low.
Cover the Dutch oven and simmer for 1.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the chopped shiso leaves and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional shiso leaves if desired.
